emails.subject: Lunch?
emails.body: Lunch? What Up Gangstar? You down to get lunch in a bit? I am getting a little hungry, let me know. peace, Darren

emails.subject: RE: Lunch?
emails.body: RE: Lunch? yeah, i sort of want that orange chicken again...what do you think To: Gang, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Lunch?
emails.body: From Manderan Cove? Last time we ate there I was not stoked about the orange chicken. But I could get something else if you want to go. I was thinking about a Great Havest Sandwich. Whatever though To: Cavanaugh, Darren

emails.subject: RE: Lunch?
emails.body: NO FROM THAT PLACE WE WENT YESTERDAY,,,YOU CAN GET GREAT HARVEST AND I'LL GET THE ORAGE CHICKEN.. LISA To: Gang, Lisa
